task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top right corner of the screen should show 'Logged in as admin' or similar indication of an authenticated session in the Redmine interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the specific target issue within the correct project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should display the issue titled 'Safety Violation: Unsecured scaffolding base in Sector 7' either in the search results, the issue list for the 'Westside Commercial Complex' project, or the issue details page.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the edit form for the correct issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The issue edit form (with dropdowns for status, priority, assignee, etc.) should be visible for the issue 'Safety Violation: Unsecured scaffolding base in Sector 7'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent changed the priority to 'Immediate'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the issue edit form, the 'Priority' dropdown field must be set to 'Immediate'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent changed the assignee to 'Marcus Thorne'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the issue edit form, the 'Assignee' dropdown field must be set to 'Marcus Thorne'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the changes successfully and the issue reflects the new state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final issue details page should be visible, ideally with a green success banner (e.g., 'Successful update'). The page must clearly show the Priority is now 'Immediate' and the Assignee is 'Marcus Thorne' for the specific 'Safety Violation: Unsecured scaffolding base in Sector 7' issue.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interface (like Chromium/Firefox) navigating the Redmine web application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show curl commands, database queries, or rails console commands used to update the issue directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely interacted with the form elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps of clicking dropdowns and selecting options in the UI, rather than just jumping to a modified HTML page or text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Project: 'Westside Commercial Complex'. Target Issue Subject: 'Safety Violation: Unsecured scaffolding base in Sector 7'. Target Assignee: 'Marcus Thorne'. Target Priority: 'Immediate'. Ensure the agent modifies ONLY this specific issue, as distractors exist.
